task_text: We're about to kick off Q3 planning. Write a one-page risk summary that identifies the top risks for the Q3 roadmap and maps each risk to the current project situation. Save it as q3_risk_summary.txt.

content.text: I’ve mapped the key project files — now I’ll review the Q3 roadmap and risk data to identify the top risks.

content.content:
Project Helios — Q3 Roadmap
INTERNAL DRAFT — Not for client distribution
Last updated: 2026-07-06

Q3 2026 Priorities:

1. COMPLETE SYSTEM INTEGRATION (July)
   - Finalize data ingestion module (target: 2026-07-18)
   - Complete client dashboard v1 (target: 2026-07-22)
   - Integration test sign-off (target: 2026-07-25)

2. PRODUCT DEMO FOR MERIDIAN (July 25)
   - Live data ingestion demonstration using Meridian sample data
   - End-to-end pipeline walkthrough
   - Dashboard visualization with real data (per contract Section 9.3)

3. USER ACCEPTANCE TESTING — MERIDIAN GROUP (August 17-28)
   - Deploy to UAT environment
   - Support Meridian user testing sessions
   - Address UAT feedback (budget: 2 sprints)

4. PERFORMANCE HARDENING (August-September)
   - Dashboard load time target: <2 seconds for 100k records
   - Ingestion throughput benchmarking (target: 500k records/min sustained)
   - External security penetration test (vendor TBD)

5. LAUNCH PREPARATION (September)
   - Production environment setup and runbook documentation
   - Hypercare plan finalization (30-day post-launch model)
   - Final client training sessions

Target launch date: 2026-10-01
Key risk: UAT slippage of >2 weeks pushes launch into Q4, triggering Section 7.1 penalty review.

Proposed Q3 feature additions (subject to change control approval):
- Scheduled ingestion jobs (cron-based triggers)
- Email alerting for pipeline failures
- Self-service mapping rule editor (deferred from Q2)

Project Helios — Risk Register
Last reviewed: 2026-07-07 | Owner: Sarah Chen (PM)

ID    Risk Description                             Likelihood  Impact  Score  Mitigation Owner    Status
----  -------------------------------------------  ----------  ------  -----  ------------------  --------
R-01  Meridian source data quality issues           High        High    9      Amir Hassan         Active — date format blocker confirmed in sprint 14
R-02  GeoSync license not renewed before demo       Medium      High    6      Raj Patel           Active — legal review in progress, due 2026-07-14
R-03  Dashboard performance on large datasets       Medium      High    6      Derek Okafor        Active — benchmark task HEL-247 not yet started
R-04  UAT timeline slippage                        High        Medium  6      Sarah Chen          Active — 1-week extension already consumed
R-05  Key person dependency: Derek Okafor           Low         High    3      Sarah Chen          Monitored — no backup tech lead identified
R-06  Meridian IT environment access delays        Medium      Medium  4      Nadia Petrov        Active — awaiting IT infrastructure diagram
R-07  Scope creep from Meridian feature requests   Low         Medium  2      Raj Patel           Monitored — 3 informal requests logged, not yet escalated
R-08  Cloud cost overrun                           Low         Low     1      Nadia Petrov        Monitored
R-09  Third-party API deprecation (non-GeoSync)    Very Low    Medium  1      Olivia Brooks       Monitored

Project Helios — Weekly Status Update
Week of 2026-07-06

Overall: ON TRACK (minor risks)

Milestone Progress:
- Data ingestion module: 85% complete
- API gateway: 100% complete (delivered)
- Client dashboard: 60% complete
- Integration testing: 40% complete

Sprint 14 Goals:
- Complete dashboard module v1
- Resolve data format inconsistencies (Blocker #1)
- Begin UAT preparation

Open Blockers:
1. Meridian source data contains inconsistent date formats (ISO 8601 vs. MM/DD/YYYY).
   Dev team awaiting clarification from Meridian IT. Estimated delay: 2-3 days.
2. Third-party mapping library (GeoSync v2.1) license renewal pending. Legal reviewing.
   Target resolution: 2026-07-14.

Next milestone: Integration Test Sign-off — target 2026-07-25

content.text: I’ve identified the top Q3 risks and their current impacts — now I’ll draft your risk summary.

input.content:
Project Helios — Q3 Risk Summary
Date: 2026-07-07 | Prepared for Q3 Planning Kickoff
Classification: INTERNAL

Overview:
Q3 roadmap targets System Integration completion in July, Meridian Product Demo on July 25, UAT Aug 17-28, Performance Hardening, and Launch Prep for Oct 1 launch. Overall status is ON TRACK (minor risks) as of week of 2026-07-06, with data ingestion at 85% and dashboard at 60%. Four active risks directly threaten Q3 milestones.

TOP RISKS MAPPED TO CURRENT SITUATION:

1. R-01: Meridian Source Data Quality Issues [Likelihood: High | Impact: High | Score: 9 | Owner: Amir Hassan]
   Risk: Inconsistent date formats (ISO 8601 vs MM/DD/YYYY) in Meridian source data disrupt ingestion.
   Current Situation: CONFIRMED ACTIVE BLOCKER in Sprint 14 (Blocker #1). Dev team awaiting clarification from Meridian IT. Estimated 2-3 day delay. Directly impacts Q3 Priority #1 (Finalize data ingestion module by 2026-07-18) and Priority #2 (Live data demo on July 25 per contract Section 9.3).
   Mitigation: Expedite Meridian IT response, implement defensive parsing, add data validation layer.

2. R-02: GeoSync License Not Renewed Before Demo [Medium | High | Score: 6 | Owner: Raj Patel]
   Risk: Third-party mapping library GeoSync v2.1 license expires/renewal pending, blocking dashboard functionality.
   Current Situation: ACTIVE BLOCKER #2. Legal review in progress, target resolution 2026-07-14. Dashboard module is only 60% complete and depends on GeoSync. Failure to renew before July 25 demo would prevent end-to-end pipeline walkthrough.
   Mitigation: Daily check-in with Legal, prepare temporary workaround / mock mapping, escalate if not resolved by 07-14.

3. R-03: Dashboard Performance on Large Datasets [Medium | High | Score: 6 | Owner: Derek Okafor]
   Risk: Client dashboard fails to meet <2s load for 100k records and 500k records/min ingestion target.
   Current Situation: Dashboard 60% complete. Benchmark task HEL-247 not yet started. Integration testing only 40% complete. This risk directly impacts Q3 Priority #4 (Performance Hardening Aug-Sep) and launch readiness.
   Mitigation: Start HEL-247 early in Sprint 15, define performance budget, involve Nadia Petrov for infra scaling.

4. R-04: UAT Timeline Slippage [High | Medium | Score: 6 | Owner: Sarah Chen]
   Risk: Delays in integration push UAT beyond Aug 17-28 window, triggering launch delay.
   Current Situation: 1-week extension already consumed per risk register. Integration Test Sign-off target is 2026-07-25, but ingestion is still at 85% and blocked. Per roadmap, UAT slippage >2 weeks pushes Oct 1 launch into Q4 and triggers Section 7.1 penalty review.
   Mitigation: Protect integration test dates, scope freeze, prepare UAT environment early, maintain 2-sprint buffer for feedback.

WATCH LIST (Lower Score but Relevant to Q3):

- R-06: Meridian IT environment access delays [Medium/Medium] — Owner Nadia Petrov — Awaiting IT infra diagram, could impact UAT deployment.
- R-05: Key person dependency — Derek Okafor — No backup tech lead, impacts all Q3 priorities.

Recommendations for Q3 Planning:
1. Prioritize resolution of R-01 and R-02 before July 14 to de-risk July 25 demo.
2. Add explicit contingency for data quality issues in Sprint 15 planning.
3. Freeze scope on proposed additions (scheduled jobs, email alerting, self-service editor) until integration sign-off achieved.
4. Initiate performance benchmarking in parallel with dashboard completion.

content.text:
Q3 risk summary has been created and saved as **q3_risk_summary.txt**.

It identifies the top 4 active risks for Project Helios (R-01 Data Quality, R-02 GeoSync license, R-03 Dashboard performance, R-04 UAT slippage) and maps each to the current situation from the weekly status (85% ingestion, 60% dashboard, blockers #1 and #2, 1-week extension consumed, July 25 demo target) and Q3 roadmap priorities, including watch-list items and mitigation recommendations.
